textByHash.4144bf0d8551eef7eac0a73f501a410428b9ef1f: [laugh] welcome to my obstacle course. Have fun, but remember this isn't a child's playground. People have died here.
textByHash.9a9af84b75e68e62ace3209a68f2a13b261da72d: Why, indeed I am. I own this agility course, it can be very dangerous!
textByHash.7f9f3e69d18a332537e8486d24d745a153954611: Yes, she did! How do you know of this? She said she probably wouldn't need it, but gave it to me for safe keeping just in case.
textByHash.3f47a208364d260ae05fdd30fa1b45feddf027a6: Well, I would give you the key, but apparently you don't have any room.
textByHash.cd30cc26dca9b1e7d1e6c1ea9072a66a91102cd0: Welcome again to my obstacle course. Have fun, but remember this isn't a child's playground. People have died here.
textByHash.59072be08a1c32d9129c07a803d12b300d11e35f: Well, I would give you another, but apparently you don't have any room.
textByHash.29d295e70ab6e7ea7d888908776976c7d50ac575: The best way to train, is to go round the course in a clockwise direction.
textByHash.226216ca5b12764e79d4a1d7dc56a99eeb120192: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
textByHash.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
textByHash.bb30e20dd7e5c0a5df0c70afa98f0b1f017d90b2: That's not much use is it, go and fetch it!
